phrases.intent_en: Ask if combo ticket with Sainte-Chapelle works here
phrases.text_local: Le billet combiné Sainte-Chapelle fonctionne ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: leh bee-YAY kom-bee-NAY sant shah-PEL fonk-SYON ee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: Combo tickets are common but each site still has separate screening lines.

responses.english: Yes, the combined ticket works. You can enter with the same ticket.
responses.phonetic: wee, leh bee-YAY kom-bee-NAY fonk-SYON. voo poo-VAY on-TRAY ah-VEK leh mem bee-YAY
responses.local: Oui, le billet combiné fonctionne. Vous pouvez entrer avec le même billet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Marie-Antoinette cell exhibit is
phrases.text_local: Où est la cellule de Marie-Antoinette ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah say-LUL duh mah-REE an-twah-NET
phrases.cultural_note: This is one of the most visited historical sections in the building.

responses.english: The cell is on the first floor, north wing. Follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: lah say-LUL eh oh pruh-MYEHR ay-TAZH, el nor. swee-VAY lay signs
responses.local: La cellule est au premier étage, aile nord. Suivez les signs.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if audio guide is available in English
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guide availability can vary by day and stock.

responses.english: Yes, we have audio guides in English. It's free with the ticket.
responses.phonetic: wee, noo zah-VON dayz oh-dee-oh-GUIDZ ahn on-GLAY. say gra-TWEE ah-VEK leh bee-YAY
responses.local: Oui, nous avons des audioguides en anglais. C'est gratuit avec le billet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long a visit usually takes
phrases.text_local: La visite dure combien de temps en général ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah vee-ZEET dur kom-BYAN duh tahn zhon zhay-nay-RAL
phrases.cultural_note: Most visitors spend around 45–75 minutes depending on exhibits.

responses.english: Generally, plan for about one to one and a half hours.
responses.phonetic: on zhay-nay-RAL, kom-TAY on-VYEHR oon UR ah oon UR ay duh-MEE
responses.local: En général, comptez environ une heure à une heure et demie.

phrases.cultural_note: Photography is usually allowed without flash unless otherwise posted.

responses.english: Yes, photos are allowed without flash. It's forbidden in certain areas.
responses.phonetic: wee, lay FOH-to son oh-toh-ree-ZAY sahn flash. say an-tay-DREE dahn certain-ZON
responses.local: Oui, les photos sont autorisées sans flash. C'est interdit dans certaines zones.
